task_params.message_subject: Am I ready to present tomorrow?
reply_points: tell him he is more prepared than he thinks
say his project is clear and useful
remind him he does not need to be perfect
suggest practicing the opening once more
encourage him to focus on explaining the problem and solution
offer support if he wants a quick run-through

attributes.subject: Am I ready to present tomorrow?
attributes.body: Hi Maximo, I'm getting nervous about presenting my project to the coding circle tomorrow. I keep thinking I'm going to freeze or forget something important. Do you think I'm actually ready, or should I ask to go later?

attributes.subject: Workshop projector update
attributes.body: The community center replaced the old projector, so the slides should display better this week.

attributes.subject: Git branch question
attributes.body: Could you take a look at my merge conflict when you have a moment?
